title: Contact | Julia Lopez
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Julia Lopez, Conservative Member of Parliament for Hornchurch & Upminster
headings: h3: Julia Lopez Conservative Member of Parliament for Hornchurch & Upminster
text_excerpt: Contact | Julia Lopez Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Julia Lopez My Plan Campaigns News In Parliament Contact GALLOWS CORNER UPDATES Contact Leave this field blank Westminster Office The House of Commons, Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, SW1A 0AA 0207 219 2631 [email protected] Constituency Office The Coach House, 133 Hall Lane, Upminster, RM14 1AL 0207 219 2631 [email protected] Find Me on Facebook Find Me on Twitter To check whether you live in the Hornchurch & Upminster, use the widget on the homepage, or click the box on the left – please bear in mind that I can only take up cases for those who reside in the constituency. The best way to contact me is through post or email – it avoids mistakes or confusion that can be made over the telephone, provides me with all the relevant documentation, gives me and my team explicit permission to act on your behalf and allows cases to be dealt with more quickly. When writing, please ensure that you include all the information and documentation relevant to your case, as well as your full address (including postcode) and any applicable reference numbers. If you are writing on behalf of somebody else, please include a letter from them authorising you to act on their behalf. I am afraid this is necessary owing to data protection regulations. I am regularly available to meet constituents at secure surgeries within our local office to offer advice and to take up cases or issues on your behalf. Please get in touch to set out your concerns and we can determine next best steps. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by Julia Lopez MP on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
